introSection: Kuddel der Hai (English: Kuddel the Shark) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently travelling with Pascal Heinen in Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a shark.

fullText:
Kuddel der Hai (English: Kuddel the Shark) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently travelling with Pascal Heinen in Germany.



Blue track and white supports.

The train is designed to resemble a shark.
